entities.name: HETERODERA GAMBIENSIS
entities.description: A species of nematode reported for the first time on pearl millet in Niger

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop, also known as Pennisetum glaucum or P. americanum, found to be infected by H. gambiensis in Niger

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where H. gambiensis was reported on pearl millet

relationships.description: reported for the first time on
